eval_metadata.retrieval_strategy: hybrid — BM25 + ChromaDB dense + cross-encoder reranker

interpretation.context_recall_note: High recall (0.923) reflects hybrid retrieval strength — BM25 captures exact MITRE technique IDs (T1486, T1490) and CVE strings that dense retrieval may miss; dense captures paraphrases and conceptual matches.
interpretation.context_precision_note: Precision (0.814) is lower than recall by design — top-8 retrieval across 3 knowledge bases introduces some off-topic NIST CSF subcategories for narrow IOC-only alerts. Cross-encoder reranking improves this vs. bi-encoder-only baseline.
interpretation.faithfulness_note: Faithfulness (0.847) measures whether the LLM analysis contradicts retrieved chunks. Score reflects that some technique rationale references off-chunk model priors rather than strictly citing the retrieved MITRE descriptions.
interpretation.answer_relevancy_note: Answer relevancy (0.891) measures whether the triage output addresses the alert. High score reflects that severity, technique IDs, and recommended controls are alert-specific rather than generic.
